# snapcd_integration_module_supply (Resource)

Manages an Integration Module Supply in Snap CD. Supplies the integration to the given module.


## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "snapcd_integration_module_supply" "alerts" {
  integration_id = data.snapcd_integration.alerts.id
  module_id      = snapcd_module.example.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `integration_id` (String) ID of the Integration that is supplied to the Module.
- `module_id` (String) ID of the Module the integration is supplied to.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Unique ID of the Integration Module Supply.
